visual_description: A group of men in an office setting, some seated at desks with computers, others standing or moving about; one man in a suit walks away from the camera toward a door. A man in a dark suit is seen from behind, walking through a dimly lit corridor with tiled walls. Another man in a suit is visible in the background, looking toward the camera with a neutral expression.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a high pitch and moderate pace, speaking in a neutral tone.
